productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men White Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteEpitomising uptown cool, these pumped-up kicks from lee Copper add a refined touch to your casual ensemble. Designed like a lifestyle shoe but equipped with sport shoe features, this pair is perfect for a shopping run on the city sidewalk, a quick coffee date or a fun game of soccer with the neighbourhood brats. Product DetailsWhite, blunt toed shoe with grey mesh inlays and blue print on the white upperCentral lace ups, has a padded tongue and innerHas a fabric pull loop at the heel collarThick rubber midsoleBlue grooved TPU outsole with a decoupled heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
